enable.name: Enable Video Wallpaper
enable.description: Enable or disable the video wallpaper.

videoPath.name: Video Path
videoPath.description: Path to the selected video wallpaper file.

pauseOnFullscreen.name: Pause on Fullscreen
pauseOnFullscreen.description: Pause when a window is fullscreen or maximized.

pauseIdleSeconds.name: Pause on Idle (seconds)
pauseIdleSeconds.description: Pause after this many seconds of inactivity. 0 = disabled.

scaleMode.name: Scale Mode
scaleMode.description: Video scaling mode: fill, fit, or crop.

enableAudio.name: Enable Audio
enableAudio.description: Enable audio playback for video wallpaper.
